column5: and he saw no other human being till he nearly reached his  manhood. When a <!!!>great drought well night devastated<!!!> the country of Aṅga,  its king Lomapāda, at the advice of Brāhmaṇas, caused
column6: great drought well nigh devastated  (night -> nigh)

Please add the two following compounds indicated in the Window Display: "kumbhayoniḥ and kumbhasaṃbhavaḥ".  Adding the compounds simply means adding them as independent "searchable" Headwords located correctly in the Hierarchy List Column.
